description: Found by Archer Silverman. When I first spotted it, I noticed the white flanks, black head, and the black upperparts. My mind immediately went BRANT. I lost it for a minute within the 2500 Cackling Geese, and thought I had just seen something before spotting it again. After this I got a bit closer and studied the bird until it flew off just before sunset. After I saw it I swiftly alerted the Denver Whatsapp group and the Colorado Birding Discord group, and one person was able to come by and see it before it flew off. Other people searched in the following days but no one was able to refind it. I go further into the identification in the Similar Species section.
photographer: Photographer: Archer Silverman, Archer Silverman, Archer Silverman, Archer Silverman, Archer Silverman
